<content>1: import type { Env } from '../types.js';
2: import { loadRuntimeFlags } from '../lib/flags.js';
3: import {
4:   appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent,
5:   createWorkspaceDeployment,

9:   hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent,

11:   updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary,

13: } from '../lib/db.js';
14: import { createWorkspaceDeploymentQueueMessage } from '../lib/workspace-deployment-queue.js';
15: import {

20: import {

27: const corsHeaders = {
28:   'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
29:   'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, DELETE, OPTIONS',
30:   'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type, Idempotency-Key',
31: };
32: 
33: const PROVIDER_PRECHECK_LEASE_MS = 30_000;
34: 
35: function jsonResponse(body: unknown, status = 200): Response {
36:   return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), {
37:     status,
38:     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...corsHeaders },
39:   });
40: }
41: 
42: function parseInteger(input: unknown, fallback: number, min: number, max: number): number {
43:   if (typeof input !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(input)) {
44:     return fallback;
45:   }
46:   const value = Math.floor(input);
47:   if (value < min) {
48:     return min;
49:   }
50:   if (value > max) {
51:     return max;
52:   }
53:   return value;
54: }
55: 
56: function parseBoolean(input: unknown, fallback: boolean): boolean {
57:   if (typeof input !== 'boolean') {
58:     return fallback;
59:   }
60:   return input;
61: }
62: 
63: function isSafeRelativeOutputDir(input: string): boolean {
64:   if (!input || input === '.') {
65:     return false;
66:   }
67:   if (input.startsWith('/') || input.includes('..') || input.includes('\\')) {
68:     return false;
69:   }
70:   return input.split('/').every((segment) => Boolean(segment) && segment !== '.');
71: }
72: 
73: function parseDeployOutputDir(input: unknown): string | null {
74:   if (typeof input !== 'string') {
75:     return null;
76:   }
77:   const trimmed = input.trim().replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/^\.\//, '').replace(/\/+$/, '');
78:   return trimmed || null;
79: }
80: 
81: function buildDeploymentIdempotencyPayload(requestPayload: {
82:   provider: string;
83:   retry: { maxRetries: number };
84:   validation: { runBuildIfPresent: boolean; runTestsIfPresent: boolean };
85:   autoFix: { rehydrateBaseline: boolean; bootstrapToolchain: boolean };
86:   toolchain: { manager: string | null; version: string | null };
87:   cache: { dependencyCache: boolean };
88:   deploy: { outputDir: string | null };
89:   rollbackOnFailure: boolean;
90:   provenance: { trigger: string; taskId: string | null; operationId: string | null; note: string | null };
91: }): Record<string, unknown> {
92:   const payload: Record<string, unknown> = {
93:     provider: requestPayload.provider,
94:     retry: requestPayload.retry,
95:     validation: requestPayload.validation,
96:     rollbackOnFailure: requestPayload.rollbackOnFailure,
97:     provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
98:   };
99: 
100:   if (requestPayload.autoFix.rehydrateBaseline || requestPayload.autoFix.bootstrapToolchain) {
101:     payload.autoFix = requestPayload.autoFix;
102:   }
103: 
104:   if (requestPayload.toolchain.manager || requestPayload.toolchain.version) {
105:     payload.toolchain = requestPayload.toolchain;
106:   }
107: 
108:   if (!requestPayload.cache.dependencyCache) {
109:     payload.cache = requestPayload.cache;
110:   }
111: 
112:   if (requestPayload.deploy.outputDir) {
113:     payload.deploy = requestPayload.deploy;
114:   }
115: 
116:   return payload;
117: }
118: 
119: function nextActionForDeploymentError(code: string | undefined): string | null {
120:   switch (code) {
121:     case 'toolchain_detect_failed':
122:       return 'Verify package.json and lockfile metadata, then retry deploy.';
123:     case 'corepack_missing':
124:       return 'Use a sandbox image with corepack available, or switch to npm toolchain.';
125:     case 'package_manager_bootstrap_failed':
126:       return 'Confirm the requested package manager version is valid and retry deploy.';
127:     case 'validation_tool_missing':
128:       return 'Disable build/test validation for this deploy or install required tooling in the sandbox image.';
129:     case 'validation_command_failed':
130:       return 'Review test/build output, fix project errors, and retry deploy.';
131:     case 'invalid_project_root':
132:       return 'Set workspace source project root to a safe relative path and retry deploy.';
133:     case 'baseline_missing':
134:     case 'baseline_rehydrate_failed':
135:       return 'Reset the workspace and retry deploy to rebuild git baseline.';
136:     case 'potential_secrets_detected':
137:       return 'Remove sensitive files from workspace before deploying (template files like .env.example are allowed).';
138:     case 'provider_auth_failed':
139:       return 'Verify CF_ACCOUNT_ID and CF_API_TOKEN, then rerun preflight.';
140:     case 'provider_scope_missing':
141:       return 'Grant Workers Scripts/Routes edit scope to CF_API_TOKEN and rerun preflight.';
142:     case 'provider_project_not_found':
143:       return 'Set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME to an existing Workers project and retry.';
144:     case 'provider_rate_limited':
145:       return 'Retry deploy after Cloudflare rate limits reset.';
146:     case 'provider_invalid_output_dir':
147:       return 'Set deploy.outputDir to a valid static build directory (for example dist or out) and retry.';
148:     case 'provider_deploy_failed':
149:       return 'Check provider deployment logs and retry after fixing configuration or build output.';
150:     default:
151:       return null;
152:   }
153: }
154: 
155: async function sha256Hex(input: string): Promise<string> {
156:   const digest = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', new TextEncoder().encode(input));
157:   return Array.from(new Uint8Array(digest))
158:     .map((byte) => byte.toString(16).padStart(2, '0'))
159:     .join('');
160: }
161: 
162: async function ensureWorkspaceReady(env: Env, workspaceId: string): Promise<Response | null> {
163:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
164:   if (!workspace || workspace.status === 'deleted') {
165:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
166:   }
167:   if (workspace.status !== 'ready') {
168:     return jsonResponse(
169:       {
170:         error: 'Workspace is not ready',
171:         workspace: {
172:           id: workspace.id,
173:           status: workspace.status,
174:           errorCode: workspace.errorCode,
175:           errorMessage: workspace.errorMessage,
176:         },
177:       },
178:       409
179:     );
180:   }
181:   return null;
182: }
183: 
184: async function ensureWorkspaceExists(env: Env, workspaceId: string): Promise<Response | null> {
185:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
186:   if (!workspace || workspace.status === 'deleted') {
187:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
188:   }
189:   return null;
190: }
191: 
192: async function ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env: Env): Promise<Response | null> {
193:   const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
194:   if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
195:     return jsonResponse(
196:       {
197:         error: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
198:         code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
199:       },
200:       403
201:     );
202:   }
203:   return null;
204: }
205: 
206: export async function handleCreateWorkspaceDeployment(
207:   workspaceId: string,
208:   request: Request,
209:   env: Env,
210:   ctx?: ExecutionContext
211: ): Promise<Response> {
212:   try {
213:     const enabled = await ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env);
214:     if (enabled) {
215:       return enabled;
216:     }
217: 
218:     const workspaceCheck = await ensureWorkspaceReady(env, workspaceId);
219:     if (workspaceCheck) {
220:       return workspaceCheck;
221:     }
222: 
223:     if (!env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE && !ctx) {
224:       return jsonResponse(
225:         {
226:           error: 'Workspace deployment runner is unavailable',
227:           code: 'workspace_deploy_runner_unavailable',
228:         },
229:         503
230:       );
231:     }
232: 
233:     const idempotencyKey = (request.headers.get('Idempotency-Key') ?? '').trim();
234:     if (!idempotencyKey) {
235:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing required Idempotency-Key header' }, 400);
236:     }
237: 
238:     const payloadRaw = await request.text();
239:     let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};
240:     if (payloadRaw.trim()) {
241:       const parsed = JSON.parse(payloadRaw) as unknown;
242:       if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) {
243:         return jsonResponse({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }, 400);
244:       }
245:       payload = parsed as Record<string, unknown>;
246:     }
247: 
248:     const providerInput = typeof payload.provider === 'string' ? payload.provider.trim() : '';
249:     const providerConfigError = getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env);
250:     if (!providerInput && providerConfigError) {
251:       return jsonResponse(
252:         {
253:           error: providerConfigError,
254:           code: 'provider_config_invalid',
255:         },
256:         400
257:       );
258:     }
259:     if (providerInput && providerInput !== 'simulated' && providerInput !== 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
260:       return jsonResponse(
261:         {
262:           error: 'Unsupported deployment provider',
263:           code: 'unsupported_deploy_provider',
264:           allowedProviders: ['simulated', 'cloudflare_workers_assets'],
265:         },
266:         400
267:       );
268:     }
269:     const provider = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(providerInput || undefined, env);
270:     const retry =
271:       payload.retry && typeof payload.retry === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.retry)
272:         ? (payload.retry as Record<string, unknown>)
273:         : {};
274:     const validation =
275:       payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
276:         ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
277:         : {};
278:     const provenance =
279:       payload.provenance && typeof payload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.provenance)
280:         ? (payload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
281:         : {};
282:     const autoFix =
283:       payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
284:         ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
285:         : {};
286:     const toolchain =
287:       payload.toolchain && typeof payload.toolchain === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.toolchain)
288:         ? (payload.toolchain as Record<string, unknown>)
289:         : {};
290:     const cache =
291:       payload.cache && typeof payload.cache === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.cache)
292:         ? (payload.cache as Record<string, unknown>)
293:         : {};
294:     const deploy =
295:       payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
296:         ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
297:         : {};
298:     const maxRetries = parseInteger(retry.maxRetries, 2, 0, 5);
299:     const outputDir = parseDeployOutputDir(deploy.outputDir);
300: 
301:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && (!outputDir || !isSafeRelativeOutputDir(outputDir))) {
302:       return jsonResponse(
303:         {
304:           error: 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider and must be a safe relative directory',
305:           code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
306:         },
307:         400
308:       );
309:     }
310: 
311:     const requestPayload = {
312:       provider,
313:       retry: {
314:         maxRetries,
315:       },
316:       validation: {
317:         runBuildIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true),
318:         runTestsIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true),
319:       },
320:       autoFix: {
321:         rehydrateBaseline: parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false),
322:         bootstrapToolchain: parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false),
323:       },
324:       toolchain: {
325:         manager: typeof toolchain.manager === 'string' && toolchain.manager.trim() ? toolchain.manager.trim() : null,
326:         version: typeof toolchain.version === 'string' && toolchain.version.trim() ? toolchain.version.trim() : null,
327:       },
328:       cache: {
329:         dependencyCache: parseBoolean(cache.dependencyCache, true),
330:       },
331:       deploy: {
332:         outputDir,
333:       },
334:       rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(payload.rollbackOnFailure, true),
335:       provenance: {
336:         trigger: typeof provenance.trigger === 'string' && provenance.trigger.trim() ? provenance.trigger.trim() : 'manual',
337:         taskId: typeof provenance.taskId === 'string' && provenance.taskId.trim() ? provenance.taskId.trim() : null,
338:         operationId:
339:           typeof provenance.operationId === 'string' && provenance.operationId.trim() ? provenance.operationId.trim() : null,
340:         note: typeof provenance.note === 'string' && provenance.note.trim() ? provenance.note.trim() : null,
341:       },
342:     };
343: 
344:     const requestPayloadSha256 = await sha256Hex(
345:       JSON.stringify(buildDeploymentIdempotencyPayload(requestPayload))
346:     );
347: 
348:     const created = await createWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, {
349:       id: generateWorkspaceDeploymentId(),
350:       workspaceId,
351:       provider,
352:       idempotencyKey,
353:       requestPayload,
354:       requestPayloadSha256,
355:       maxRetries,
356:       provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
357:     });
358: 
359:     if (!created.reused) {
360:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
361:         workspaceId,
362:         deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
363:         eventType: 'deployment_created',
364:         payload: {
365:           provider,
366:           maxRetries,
367:           provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
368:         },
369:       });
370:     }
371: 
372:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && created.deployment.status === 'queued') {
373:       const hasPrecheckPassed = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
374:         env.DB,
375:         workspaceId,
376:         created.deployment.id,
377:         'deployment_provider_precheck_passed'
378:       );
379:       const hasPrecheckFailed = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
380:         env.DB,
381:         workspaceId,
382:         created.deployment.id,
383:         'deployment_provider_precheck_failed'
384:       );
385:       const alreadyEnqueued = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
386:         env.DB,
387:         workspaceId,
388:         created.deployment.id,
389:         'deployment_enqueued'
390:       );
391: 
392:       if (hasPrecheckFailed) {
393:         return jsonResponse(
394:           {
395:             error: created.deployment.error?.message ?? 'Provider precheck previously failed',
396:             code: created.deployment.error?.code ?? 'provider_deploy_failed',
397:           },
398:           400
399:         );
400:       }
401: 
402:       if (!hasPrecheckPassed && !alreadyEnqueued) {
403:         const claimTime = new Date().toISOString();
404:         const precheckLeaseCutoff = new Date(Date.now() - PROVIDER_PRECHECK_LEASE_MS).toISOString();
405:         const claimed = await env.DB
406:           .prepare(
407:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
408:              SET error_code = 'provider_precheck_running',
409:                  error_message = 'Provider precheck in progress',
410:                  updated_at = ?
411:              WHERE id = ?
412:                AND workspace_id = ?
413:                AND status = 'queued'
414:                AND (
415:                  error_code IS NULL
416:                  OR error_code = 'retry_scheduled'
417:                  OR (error_code = 'provider_precheck_running' AND updated_at <= ?)
418:                )`
419:           )
420:           .bind(claimTime, created.deployment.id, workspaceId, precheckLeaseCutoff)
421:           .run();
422: 
423:         if ((claimed.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
424:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
425:           if (concurrent) {
426:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
427:           }
428:         }
429: 
430:         try {
431:           const precheckChecks = await createWorkspaceDeployProvider(provider, env).precheck();
432:           const failed = precheckChecks.find((check) => !check.ok);
433:           if (failed) {
434:             const failureMessage = failed.details ?? 'Provider precheck failed';
435:             const now = new Date().toISOString();
436:             const failedUpdate = await env.DB
437:               .prepare(
438:                 `UPDATE workspace_deployments
439:                  SET status = 'failed',
440:                      error_code = ?,
441:                      error_message = ?,
442:                      finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
443:                      updated_at = ?
444:                  WHERE id = ?
445:                    AND workspace_id = ?
446:                    AND status = 'queued'
447:                    AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'
448:                    AND updated_at = ?`
449:               )
450:               .bind(failed.code, failureMessage, now, now, created.deployment.id, workspaceId, claimTime)
451:               .run();
452: 
453:             if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
454:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
455:                 workspaceId,
456:                 deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
457:                 eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_failed',
458:                 payload: {
459:                   code: failed.code,
460:                   message: failureMessage,
461:                 },
462:               });
463:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
464:                 deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
465:                 status: 'failed',
466:                 errorCode: failed.code,
467:                 errorMessage: failureMessage,
468:               });
469:               return jsonResponse({ error: failureMessage, code: failed.code }, 400);
470:             }
471: 
472:             const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
473:             if (concurrent) {
474:               return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
475:             }
476:           }
477: 
478:           const clearClaim = await env.DB
479:             .prepare(
480:               `UPDATE workspace_deployments
481:                SET error_code = NULL,
482:                    error_message = NULL,
483:                    updated_at = ?
484:                WHERE id = ?
485:                  AND workspace_id = ?
486:                  AND status = 'queued'
487:                  AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'
488:                  AND updated_at = ?`
489:             )
490:             .bind(new Date().toISOString(), created.deployment.id, workspaceId, claimTime)
491:             .run();
492: 
493:           if ((clearClaim.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
494:             const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
495:             if (concurrent) {
496:               return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
497:             }
498:           }
499: 
500:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
501:             workspaceId,
502:             deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
503:             eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_passed',
504:             payload: {
505:               checks: precheckChecks,
506:             },
507:           });
508:         } catch (error) {
509:           const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
510:           const now = new Date().toISOString();
511:           const failedUpdate = await env.DB
512:             .prepare(
513:               `UPDATE workspace_deployments
514:                SET status = 'failed',
515:                    error_code = ?,
516:                    error_message = ?,
517:                    finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
518:                    updated_at = ?
519:                WHERE id = ?
520:                  AND workspace_id = ?
521:                  AND status = 'queued'
522:                  AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'
523:                  AND updated_at = ?`
524:             )
525:             .bind(providerError.code, providerError.message, now, now, created.deployment.id, workspaceId, claimTime)
526:             .run();
527: 
528:           if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
529:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
530:               workspaceId,
531:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
532:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_failed',
533:               payload: {
534:                 code: providerError.code,
535:                 message: providerError.message,
536:               },
537:             });
538:             await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
539:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
540:               status: 'failed',
541:               errorCode: providerError.code,
542:               errorMessage: providerError.message,
543:             });
544:             return jsonResponse({ error: providerError.message, code: providerError.code }, 400);
545:           }
546: 
547:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
548:           if (concurrent) {
549:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
550:           }
551:         }
552:       }
553:     }
554: 
555:     const latestDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
556:     const deploymentForQueue = latestDeployment ?? created.deployment;
557: 
558:     if (deploymentForQueue.status === 'queued') {
559:       const hasEnqueuedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
560:         env.DB,
561:         workspaceId,
562:         deploymentForQueue.id,
563:         'deployment_enqueued'
564:       );
565:       const shouldRecoverQueued = created.reused && deploymentForQueue.error?.code === 'retry_scheduled';
566:       const hasRecoveredReenqueue = shouldRecoverQueued
567:         ? await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id, 'deployment_reenqueue_recovered')
568:         : false;
569: 
570:       if (!hasEnqueuedEvent || (shouldRecoverQueued && !hasRecoveredReenqueue)) {
571:         if (env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE) {
572:           await env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE.send(
573:             createWorkspaceDeploymentQueueMessage(workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id)
574:           );
575:         } else if (ctx) {
576:           ctx.waitUntil(
577:             runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(env, workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id, deploymentForQueue.maxRetries + 1)
578:           );
579:         }
580: 
581:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
582:           workspaceId,
583:           deploymentId: deploymentForQueue.id,
584:           eventType: 'deployment_enqueued',
585:           payload: {
586:             mode: env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE ? 'queue' : 'inline',
587:             reused: created.reused,
588:           },
589:         });
590: 
591:         if (shouldRecoverQueued && !hasRecoveredReenqueue) {
592:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
593:             workspaceId,
594:             deploymentId: deploymentForQueue.id,
595:             eventType: 'deployment_reenqueue_recovered',
596:             payload: {
597:               reason: 'retry_scheduled_replay',
598:             },
599:           });
600:         }
601:       }
602:     }
603: 
604:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: deploymentForQueue }, created.reused ? 200 : 202);
605:   } catch (error) {
606:     if (error instanceof WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError) {
607:       return jsonResponse(
608:         {
609:           error: 'Idempotency key has already been used with different payload',
610:           code: 'idempotency_key_conflict',
611:         },
612:         409
613:       );
614:     }
615: 
616:     if (error instanceof SyntaxError) {
617:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }, 400);
618:     }
619: 
620:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
621:     return jsonResponse({ error: `Failed to create workspace deployment: ${message}` }, 500);
622:   }
623: }
624: 
625: export async function handleWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
626:   workspaceId: string,
627:   request: Request,
628:   env: Env
629: ): Promise<Response> {
630:   const enabled = await ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env);
631:   if (enabled) {
632:     return enabled;
633:   }
634: 
635:   const workspaceCheck = await ensureWorkspaceReady(env, workspaceId);
636:   if (workspaceCheck) {
637:     return workspaceCheck;
638:   }
639: 
640:   let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};
641:   try {
642:     const raw = await request.text();
643:     if (raw.trim()) {
644:       const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as unknown;
645:       if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) {
646:         return jsonResponse({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }, 400);
647:       }
648:       payload = parsed as Record<string, unknown>;
649:     }
650:   } catch {
651:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }, 400);
652:   }
653: 
654:   const validation =
655:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
656:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
657:       : {};
658:   const autoFix =
659:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
660:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
661:       : {};
662:   const deploy =
663:     payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
664:       ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
665:       : {};
666:   const providerInput = typeof payload.provider === 'string' ? payload.provider.trim() : '';
667:   const providerConfigError = getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env);
668:   if (!providerInput && providerConfigError) {
669:     return jsonResponse(
670:       {
671:         preflight: {
672:           ok: false,
673:           toolchain: null,
674:           checks: [{ code: 'provider_config_invalid', ok: false, details: providerConfigError }],
675:           remediations: [],
676:         },
677:         nextAction: 'Set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER to simulated or cloudflare_workers_assets and retry preflight.',
678:       },
679:       200
680:     );
681:   }
682:   if (providerInput && providerInput !== 'simulated' && providerInput !== 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
683:     return jsonResponse(
684:       {
685:         preflight: {
686:           ok: false,
687:           toolchain: null,
688:           checks: [{ code: 'unsupported_deploy_provider', ok: false, details: `Unsupported provider: ${providerInput}` }],
689:           remediations: [],
690:         },
691:         nextAction: 'Use provider=cloudflare_workers_assets or provider=simulated.',
692:       },
693:       200
694:     );
695:   }
696:   const provider = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(providerInput || undefined, env);
697:   const outputDir = parseDeployOutputDir(deploy.outputDir);
698: 
699:   if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && (!outputDir || !isSafeRelativeOutputDir(outputDir))) {
700:     return jsonResponse(
701:       {
702:         preflight: {
703:           ok: false,
704:           toolchain: null,
705:           checks: [
706:             {
707:               code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
708:               ok: false,
709:               details: 'deploy.outputDir is required and must be a safe relative directory',
710:             },
711:           ],
712:           remediations: [],
713:         },
714:         nextAction: 'Set deploy.outputDir to your static build output directory and retry preflight.',
715:       },
716:       200
717:     );
718:   }
719:   const runBuildIfPresent = parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true);
720:   const runTestsIfPresent = parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true);
721:   const rehydrateBaseline = parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false);
722:   const bootstrapToolchain = parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false);
723: 
724:   try {
725:     const preflight = await runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(env, workspaceId, {
726:       runBuildIfPresent,
727:       runTestsIfPresent,
728:       rehydrateBaseline,
729:       bootstrapToolchain,
730:       provider,
731:       outputDir,
732:     });
733: 
734:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
735:       try {
736:         const providerChecks = await createWorkspaceDeployProvider(provider, env).precheck();
737:         preflight.checks.push(...providerChecks);
738:       } catch (error) {
739:         const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
740:         preflight.checks.push({ code: providerError.code, ok: false, details: providerError.message });
741:       }
742:       preflight.ok = preflight.checks.every((check) => check.ok);
743:     }
744: 
745:     const failedCheck = preflight.checks.find((check) => !check.ok);
746:     const nextAction = failedCheck
747:       ? failedCheck.code === 'validation_tooling'
748:         ? 'Disable build/test validation or install the detected package manager in the sandbox runtime image.'
749:         : failedCheck.code === 'git_baseline'
750:           ? 'Reset workspace to rebuild git baseline and retry deploy.'
751:           : failedCheck.code === 'secret_scan'
752:             ? 'Remove sensitive files from workspace before deploying.'
753:             : failedCheck.code === 'toolchain_detect'
754:               ? 'Fix package.json/lockfile metadata and retry preflight.'
755:               : failedCheck.code === 'toolchain_bootstrap'
756:                 ? 'Enable auto-fix bootstrap or use a sandbox image with corepack support.'
757:                 : failedCheck.code === 'project_root'
758:                   ? 'Set workspace source project root to a safe relative path and retry preflight.'
759:                   : failedCheck.code === 'provider_invalid_output_dir'
760:                     ? 'Set deploy.outputDir to a valid static build output directory and retry preflight.'
761:                     : failedCheck.code === 'provider_auth_failed'
762:                       ? 'Verify Cloudflare account credentials in worker env and retry preflight.'
763:                       : failedCheck.code === 'provider_scope_missing'
764:                         ? 'Grant required Cloudflare token scopes and retry preflight.'
765:                         : failedCheck.code === 'provider_project_not_found'
766:                           ? 'Set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME to a valid Workers project and retry preflight.'
767:                           : failedCheck.code === 'provider_rate_limited'
768:                             ? 'Wait for provider rate limits to reset and retry preflight.'
769:             : null
770:       : null;
771:     return jsonResponse({ preflight, nextAction });
772:   } catch (error) {
773:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
774:     return jsonResponse(
775:       {
776:         preflight: {
777:           ok: false,
778:           toolchain: null,
779:           checks: [{ code: 'internal_error', ok: false, details: message }],
780:           remediations: [],
781:         },
782:       },
783:       500
784:     );
785:   }
786: }

788: export async function handleGetWorkspaceDeployment(
789:   workspaceId: string,
790:   deploymentId: string,
791:   env: Env
792: ): Promise<Response> {
793:   const workspaceMissing = await ensureWorkspaceExists(env, workspaceId);
794:   if (workspaceMissing) {
795:     return workspaceMissing;
796:   }
797: 
798:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
799:   if (!deployment) {
800:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Deployment not found' }, 404);
801:   }
802: 
803:   return jsonResponse({
804:     deployment,
805:     nextAction: nextActionForDeploymentError(deployment.error?.code),
806:   });
807: }

809: export async function handleGetWorkspaceDeploymentEvents(
810:   workspaceId: string,
811:   deploymentId: string,
812:   request: Request,
813:   env: Env
814: ): Promise<Response> {
815:   const workspaceMissing = await ensureWorkspaceExists(env, workspaceId);
816:   if (workspaceMissing) {
817:     return workspaceMissing;
818:   }
819: 
820:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
821:   if (!deployment) {
822:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Deployment not found' }, 404);
823:   }
824: 
825:   const url = new URL(request.url);
826:   const from = Number.parseInt(url.searchParams.get('from') ?? '0', 10);
827:   const limit = Number.parseInt(url.searchParams.get('limit') ?? '500', 10);
828:   const fromExclusive = Number.isFinite(from) && from > 0 ? from : 0;
829:   const boundedLimit = Number.isFinite(limit) ? Math.max(1, Math.min(limit, 1000)) : 500;
830: 
831:   const events = await listWorkspaceDeploymentEvents(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId, fromExclusive, boundedLimit);
832:   return jsonResponse({ deploymentId, events });
833: }

835: export async function handleCancelWorkspaceDeployment(
836:   workspaceId: string,
837:   deploymentId: string,
838:   env: Env,
839:   ctx?: ExecutionContext
840: ): Promise<Response> {
841:   const workspaceMissing = await ensureWorkspaceExists(env, workspaceId);
842:   if (workspaceMissing) {
843:     return workspaceMissing;
844:   }
845: 
846:   const cancelResult = await cancelWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
847:   if (!cancelResult.deployment) {
848:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Deployment not found' }, 404);
849:   }
850: 
851:   if (cancelResult.updated) {
852:     if (
853:       !env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE &&
854:       ctx &&
855:       cancelResult.deployment?.status === 'running' &&
856:       cancelResult.deployment.cancelRequestedAt
857:     ) {
858:       ctx.waitUntil(runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 2));
859:     }
860: 
861:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: cancelResult.deployment }, 202);
862:   }
863: 
864:   if (cancelResult.deployment.status === 'running' && cancelResult.deployment.cancelRequestedAt) {
865:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: cancelResult.deployment }, 202);
866:   }
867: 
868:   return jsonResponse(
869:     {
870:       error: 'Deployment is already terminal and cannot be cancelled',
871:       code: 'deployment_not_cancellable',
872:       deployment: cancelResult.deployment,
873:     },
874:     409
875:   );
876: }

metadata.description: Shows tests added for workspace deployments API

parts.text:
No blocking issues found in `packages/worker/src/api/workspace-deployments.ts` for the lease-ownership fix.

I specifically checked the `updated_at` claim-token flow and it looks correct for ownership safety:
- Claim sets `error_code='provider_precheck_running'` and stamps `updated_at = claimTime`.
- Both terminal writes (`failedUpdate`) and claim release (`clearClaim`) require `updated_at = claimTime`, so only the active lease holder can finalize.
- On lost ownership (`changes === 0`), the handler falls back to returning the current deployment state instead of mutating it.

So the updated_at token checks appear to properly prevent stale claimant overwrites.
